title: Minecraft but you're a fish
description: Now the player can only stay in the water.
body:
This is more of a joke project in which the player takes damage if he is not in the water. 
It works the same way in hell, the player does not take damage unless he is in lava (lol).
Theoretically, it is possible to complete Minecraft. 
I also made the bucket crafting a little more complicated so that it wouldn't be so easy). 

______________________________________________________________________________________________

### Roadmap:
in the future, I plan to make a full-fledged mod out of the datapack, adding new crafts and items, a modified player model, and so on.
______________________________________________________________________________________________

### Multiplayer mode.
There's no reason why it wouldn't work.

______________________________________________________________________________________________
For a forced start, if for some reason the modification did not load.


```
/reload

/schedule function pv:tick 1t replace
```


______________________________________________________________________________________________
### AI 
generated the project icon
